summary: Mexican food website with a full-bleed hero image extending to the top of the page and a scrollable header displaying 'Delicious Mexican Food'.

existing_features.title: Extend the hero section image so it fills the full viewport from the very top of the page (y=0), removing any top offset or gap caused by the sticky header. The hero image must visually bleed behind the header so there is no white space or padding between the top of the viewport and the image.

Update the Header component so that the tagline text reads exactly 'Delicious Mexican Food' (visible while the header is shown) and the header hides/disappears when the user scrolls down, reappearing when the user scrolls back up. All other header content (logo, nav links, phone number, hamburger menu) must remain unchanged.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero image extends full bleed to the very top of the page
Header displays 'Delicious Mexican Food' text and disappears when scrolling down
